utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Sure , I can hang out til I have to meet you . What uh ... How come you are not going ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I have a job interview I have to get ready for .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I thought you already have a job .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And people say you do not pay attention .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , this is a much better job .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is vice ... president of a company that does data reconfiguration and statistical factoring for other companies .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Wow ! How do you know how to do that ? !

emotion_cause.span: 7_How do you know how to do that ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is what I do now .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Remember that guy that gave me a bad review ? Well ... I am getting my revenge !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: He teaches a course on food criticism at the New School , so before we go to the movies I wanna go by there and make him try my bouillabaisse again .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , I cannot wait to read the front page of the Post tomorrow !

emotion_cause.span: 16_Restaurant reviewer admits : I was wrong about Monica .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: " Restaurant reviewer admits : I was wrong about Monica . "

emotion_cause.span: 16_Restaurant reviewer admits : I was wrong about Monica .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: The front page ? You really do live in your own little world , do not you ?
